title: Behavior Melee Attack
description: Allows the mob to use close combat melee attacks.

attack_once.description: Whether the entity only attacks once per engagement.

attack_types.description: Specific attack types this melee attack is restricted to.

melee_fov.description: Field of view, in degrees, within which the entity can perform the attack.

random_stop_interval.description: Maximum number of ticks the entity can chase before stopping.

reach_multiplier.description: Multiplier applied to the attack reach distance.

speed_multiplier.description: Movement speed multiplier while chasing the target.

track_target.description: Whether the entity tracks its target even when out of sight.
